cards.front: What is the main challenge in connecting Software Engineering (SE) and User Experience (UX)?
cards.back: Aligning the technical requirements of SE with the user-centric goals of UX

cards.front: Why is it challenging to connect SE and UX?
cards.back: Different design thinking and problem-solving approaches, varying levels of technical expertise, and differing priorities

cards.front: How can SE teams connect with UX teams?
cards.back: Establishing a user-centered design process, using prototypes and feedback to validate assumptions, and fostering collaboration and communication

cards.front: What is the role of prototypes in connecting SE and UX?
cards.back: Prototypes help bridge the gap between technical feasibility and user experience, allowing teams to validate assumptions and iterate on designs

cards.front: How can designers in UX teams effectively communicate with developers in SE teams?
cards.back: Using design systems, creating technical documentation, and focusing on shared goals and user outcomes to ensure alignment and mutual understanding
